hooks.command: bash -c 'mkdir -p vendor && ([ -d vendor/ndscan/.git ] || git clone --depth=1 https://github.com/OxfordIonTrapGroup/ndscan.git vendor/ndscan) && ([ -d vendor/artiq/.git ] || git clone --depth=1 https://github.com/m-labs/artiq.git vendor/artiq)'
hooks.statusMessage: Cloning ndscan and ARTIQ reference repositories into vendor/...
